ast.name: addOption
ast.source: Only publish: true notes
ast.target: 仅发布：publish: true 的笔记

ast.name: addOption
ast.source: All Markdown notes
ast.target: 所有Markdown笔记

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Either all Markdown notes are scanned, or only those with the property publish: true
ast.target: 扫描所有Markdown笔记，或仅扫描带有属性 publish: true 的笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Where timeline data notes are generated (must match runtime).
ast.target: 生成时间线数据笔记的位置（必须与运行时匹配）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This note is generated; use publish → add linked on it.
ast.target: 此笔记是生成的；请在其上使用发布 → 添加链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use the custom month names from your timeline settings.
ast.target: 使用您时间线设置中的自定义月份名称。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Overrides per timeline name. Example:
travelbook 1: [januar, februar, ...]
ast.target: 按时间线名称覆盖。示例：\ntravelbook 1: [januar, februar, ...]

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Generates per-base transparent webp overlays for text layers, so local fonts don't break layout on publish.
ast.target: 为文本图层生成基于基础图像的透明webp覆盖层，以便本地字体在发布时不会破坏布局。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Vault folder where the generated webp overlays are stored.
ast.target: 存储生成的webp覆盖层的库文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, ttrpg tools: publish generates transparent webp overlays per base image for text layers.
ast.target: 如果启用，ttrpg工具：发布将为文本图层生成基于基础图像的透明webp覆盖层。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: All publish data notes will be written here.
ast.target: 所有发布数据笔记将写入此处。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This note is generated and contains links to all needed assets.
ast.target: 此笔记是生成的，并包含所有所需资产的链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional. If enabled, the assets manifest also includes all notes linked from markers (pins, swap pins, ping pins, etc.).
ast.target: 可选。如果启用，资产清单还将包含所有从标记（图钉、交换图钉、ping图钉等）链接的笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: One per line or comma separated. Notes stay published and hover previews still work.
ast.target: 每行一个或用逗号分隔。笔记保持发布状态，悬停预览仍然有效。

ast.target: 时间线：月份覆盖（可选）。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: TTRPG Tools: Publish: exportLibraryNote failed (continuing with markers).
ast.target: TTRPG工具：发布：exportLibraryNote失败（继续处理标记）。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: TTRPG Tools: Publish: saveLibraryToPath failed.
ast.target: TTRPG工具：发布：saveLibraryToPath失败。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Zoom Map Publish: failed to delete old marker note
ast.target: 缩放地图发布：删除旧标记笔记失败

ast.name: warn
ast.source: TTRPG Tools: Publish: extractFirstParagraph failed
ast.target: TTRPG工具：发布：extractFirstParagraph失败

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Timeline Publish: failed to delete old timeline note
ast.target: 时间线发布：删除旧时间线笔记失败

ast.name: warn
ast.source: TTRPG Tools: Publish: failed to parse markers json
ast.target: TTRPG工具：发布：解析markers json失败

ast.name: warn
ast.source: TTRPG Tools: Publish: failed to parse library json
ast.target: TTRPG工具：发布：解析library json失败

ast.name: warn
ast.source: TTRPG Tools: Publish: getZoomMapPluginApi failed.
ast.target: TTRPG 工具：发布：获取 ZoomMap 插件 API 失败。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: TTRPG Tools: Publish: done. Next: Publish changes → select publish.js/publish.css and ZoomMap/publish/assets.md → Add linked → Publish.
ast.target: TTRPG 工具：发布完成。下一步：发布更改 → 选择 publish.js/publish.css 和 ZoomMap/publish/assets.md → 添加链接 → 发布。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: TTRPG Tools: Publish: Timeline done. Next: Publish changes → select publish.js/publish.css and Timeline assets note → Add linked → Publish.
ast.target: TTRPG 工具：发布：时间线完成。下一步：发布更改 → 选择 publish.js/publish.css 和时间线资源笔记 → 添加链接 → 发布。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Ttrpg tools: publish: maps + timeline done.
ast.target: TTRPG 工具：发布：地图 + 时间线完成。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Tttrpg tools: publish: library export failed (see console). Markers will still be generated.
ast.target: TTRPG 工具：发布：库导出失败（请查看控制台）。标记仍将生成。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Ttrpg tools: publish: failed to export zoom map library.json (see console).
ast.target: TTRPG 工具：发布：导出缩放地图库 library.json 失败（请查看控制台）。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Ttrpg tools: publish: library.json is invalid JSON.
ast.target: TTRPG 工具：发布：library.json 是无效的 JSON。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Next: Publish changes → select ZoomMap/publish/assets.md → Add linked → Publish.
ast.target: 下一步：发布更改 → 选择 ZoomMap/publish/assets.md → 添加链接 → 发布。
